seed_instruction: Analyze the educational value of the online course "Machine Learning by Andrew Ng."
org_constraint: The response must contain at least three sentences written in passive voice.
new_constraint: Write the response entirely in active voice.
instruction: Analyze the educational value of the online course "Machine Learning by Andrew Ng." The response must contain at least three sentences written in passive voice. Write the response entirely in active voice.
response:
Andrew Ng's "Machine Learning" course offers immense educational value for aspiring data scientists. The curriculum provides a robust foundation in supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms. Complex mathematical concepts are simplified through clear, intuitive explanations. Students gain practical skills by applying theory to real-world datasets. 

The course was designed by a pioneer in the field of artificial intelligence. High-quality lectures were delivered by a renowned expert. Valuable insights were shared with thousands of learners worldwide. 

The course bridges the gap between academic theory and industrial application. It empowers students to build predictive models and understand the mechanics of neural networks. This educational journey prepares learners for successful careers in technology.<turn|>
